description: Phase 13: UX Refinement & Critical Fixes — Navigation, state management, performance, and core feature wiring

userStories.title: Initialize NotificationService in main.dart and request POST_NOTIFICATIONS permission
userStories.notes: DONE. NotificationService.initialize() is never called at app startup. Channel not created, tz.local not set, no permission requested. All reminders are silently broken. In main.dart after Supabase init, call NotificationService.initialize(). Request POST_NOTIFICATIONS on Android 13+. Verify a test reminder actually fires on device.

userStories.title: Wire dashboard recovery score to PerformanceEngine (remove Future.delayed stub)
userStories.notes: DONE. dashboard_provider.dart lines 81-102: _loadRecoveryScore does nothing except Future.delayed(500ms). PerformanceEngine and InsightsRepository already compute recovery scores. Wire _loadRecoveryScore to call insightsRepository.getLatestRecoveryScore() or calculate via PerformanceEngine. Remove the artificial 500ms delay. recoveryScoreColorProvider should reflect real data.

userStories.title: Add back buttons to all pushed screens missing them
userStories.notes: DONE. 6 screens pushed via context.push() have no AppBar back button: reminders_screen.dart, supplements_screen.dart, insights_dashboard_screen.dart, health_connection_screen.dart, recovery_detail_screen.dart, daily_view_screen.dart. Add leading IconButton(icon: Icon(Icons.arrow_back), onPressed: () => context.pop()) to each AppBar. Users currently must use Android system back gesture.

userStories.title: Add provider invalidation after mutations (fix stale state)
userStories.notes: DONE. After mutations, downstream providers are never refreshed. Fix these chains: (1) liveSessionProvider.completeSession() must invalidate insightsProvider and dashboardHomeProvider. (2) morningCheckInProvider.submit() must invalidate insightsProvider to recalculate recovery. (3) bloodworkProvider add/update/delete must invalidate insightsProvider. (4) habitProvider toggle must invalidate dashboardHomeProvider. Add ref.invalidate() or ref.refresh() calls after each mutation.

userStories.title: Fix bedtime calculation off-by-one for wakeHour >= 7
userStories.notes: DONE. prescription_engine_test.dart line 515-518 documents this bug: wakeHour=7 calculates bedtime as 21:00 (9PM) instead of expected 23:00 (11PM). The clamping formula in PrescriptionEngine has an off-by-one on the lower bound. Fix the formula so bedtime = wakeHour - sleepTarget (typically 7-8hrs) and update the test to assert the correct value.

userStories.title: Add debounce to AI calls (bloodwork, insights, check-in)
userStories.notes: DONE. No debounce on AI-calling methods. Double-tap fires duplicate API calls, wastes quota. Add debounce/mutex to: (1) bloodworkProvider.requestAiInterpretation() (2) insightsProvider.generateInsightNarrative() (3) morningCheckInProvider.submit() AI narration call. Use a DateTime-based guard: if last call was < 2 seconds ago, return early.

userStories.title: Convert sequential Supabase queries to Future.wait in MorningCheckInNotifier.submit()
userStories.notes: DONE. morning_checkin_provider.dart lines 289-357: submit() makes 5 sequential getMetrics calls (recovery, steps, HR, calories, weight) that are independent. Convert to Future.wait([...]) to run concurrently. This will reduce check-in submission latency by ~4x.

userStories.title: Move direct Supabase calls from providers into repositories
userStories.notes: DONE. bloodwork_provider.dart lines 221-236: directly calls Supabase.instance.client to check ai_consent_bloodwork. This bypasses the repository pattern. Move this consent check into ProfileRepository (add getAiConsentBloodwork(profileId) method). Similarly, morning_checkin_provider.dart line 255 accesses Supabase.instance.client.auth.currentUser?.id directly — use the auth provider instead.

userStories.title: Add confirmation dialogs to destructive actions
userStories.notes: DONE. No confirmation before: delete goal, archive shopping list, remove bloodwork entry, delete habit. Add showDialog with 'Are you sure?' confirmation before each destructive operation. Pattern: AlertDialog with Cancel and Delete actions. Use red color for delete button.

userStories.title: Create error message mapping utility for user-friendly errors
userStories.notes: DONE. Raw exceptions shown to users (e.g. type 'Null' is not a type of 'Map'). Create shared/core/utils/error_mapper.dart with static mapError(dynamic error) -> String method. Map common errors: network errors -> 'No internet connection', timeout -> 'Request timed out', 404 -> 'Not found', auth errors -> 'Please sign in again', generic -> 'Something went wrong. Please try again.' Apply in all providers that show errors via SnackBar.

userStories.title: Fix N+1 query in OverloadDetectionService and push workout filter to DB
userStories.notes: DONE. Two performance issues: (1) overload_detection_service.dart lines 85-103: detectPlateausForExercises iterates exercises making 1 query per exercise. Batch into single query with IN clause. (2) workouts_card.dart lines 37-41: fetches 50 completed workouts and filters client-side for this week. Add startDate parameter to getCompletedWorkouts and push filter to DB.

userStories.title: Add semantic labels and tooltips to all icon buttons for accessibility
userStories.notes: DONE. Only 35 semantic labels in entire app. All IconButton widgets need tooltip parameter. All GestureDetector/InkWell widgets wrapping icons need Semantics wrapper. Focus on: dashboard action buttons, navigation icons, form action buttons, timer controls, chart interactions. This is required for Play Store accessibility compliance.
